{topics.map((t, i) => { const day = i + 1; const currentDay = parseInt(localStorage.getItem("currentDay") || "1"); const completedDays = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("completedDays") || "[]"); const isToday = day === currentDay; const isCompleted = completedDays.includes(day); return (
{/* ICON */}
{isCompleted ? "✅" : isToday ? "🔥" : "📘"}
{/* CONTENT */}
{/* HEADER */}

Day {day}

{/* STATUS BADGE */} {isCompleted && ( Completed )} {isToday && !isCompleted && ( Today )}
{/* TOPICS */}
    {t.map((topic, index) => (
  • 👉 {topic}
    • ))}
); })}
